headline: This 5-Star ETF Pays Monthly Dividends and Has Never Missed in 19 Years
summary: For retirees piecing together income from multiple sources, WisdomTree U.S. High Dividend Fund (NYSEARCA:DHS) has become a quiet staple. With over 400 individual holdings and 19 years of uninterrupted monthly distributions, it offers consistency that income-focused investors genuinely value. But a 5-star reputation deserves scrutiny, not just admiration. How DHS Generates Its Income DHS is ... This 5-Star ETF Pays Monthly Dividends and Has Never Missed in 19 Years

headline: Assessing Tempus AI (TEM) Valuation After Expanded Merck Collaboration Announcement
summary: Tempus AI (TEM) is back in focus after announcing an expanded multi year collaboration with Merck that puts its de identified multimodal data and AI tools to work on Merck’s oncology and broader drug discovery efforts. See our latest analysis for Tempus AI. Despite the Merck collaboration and the February earnings and guidance update, momentum in Tempus AI’s share price has been weak. The 90 day share price return shows a decline of 32.17% and the year to date share price return shows a...

headline: Tempus AI Deepens Merck Collaboration As Pharma Demand And Losses Evolve
summary: Tempus AI and Merck announced an expanded multi year collaboration focused on AI driven precision medicine and drug discovery in oncology and other therapeutic areas. The partnership aims to combine Tempus AI's large scale genomic and clinical data with Merck's drug development capabilities to support biomarker discovery and clinical research. The agreement extends and broadens an existing relationship, positioning Tempus AI as a key data and AI partner for a major pharmaceutical...

headline: Codexis Targets 2026 Inflection as CEO Touts ECO Synthesis Push in RNA Manufacturing at TD Cowen Conf
summary: Codexis (NASDAQ:CDXS) President and CEO Alison Moore outlined the company’s strategic focus on RNA medicines manufacturing at TD Cowen’s 46th Annual Health Care Conference, emphasizing expected inflection points in 2026 tied to its ECO Synthesis platform and continued execution in its legacy pharma
